answer: accessing the instance. What are security groups? They are basically v irtual firewall s – controls inbound (ingress ) and outbound (egress) traffic. What is an E lastic IP? A static IP address that is attached to an instance. Even if we stop and restart our instance, IP remains the same. What is an Elastic Block S tore (EBS) ? It is a block -level persistent storage volume attached to an instance. Data in this is retained after termination. What are snapshots? They are backups of our instances at a point in time from which we can duplicate our instances or recover them. What i s availab ility? Ability of a system to remain accessible and operational even if some components fail . What is elasticity? Ability of a system to automatically grow and increase resources based on demand. (Scale in, Scale out) What is scal ability ? Ability of a system to handle growing or shrinking workloads b 1. AWS EC 2 Elastic Compute Cloud (EC2 ) is a virtual server for running applications on the AWS infrastructure. It’s a virtual machine running on AWS’s physical infrastructure that provides resizable compute capacity . According to our needs, we can customize various a spects of it such as: • OS (Amazon Linux, Microsoft Windows , Apple Mac ) • Instance Type (general purpose, memory opti mized, compute optimized , storage optimized) • Purchasing Plans (On-Demand, Reserved, Savings, Sp ot, Dedicat ed Instances, D edicated Hosts) • Region/Availability Zone What is an A mazon Machine Image (AMI)
